name: Aruba Networks, Inc.
description: Aruba Networks, Inc., a subsidiary of Hewlett Packard Enterprise, is a leading provider of next-generation network access solutions for the mobile enterprise. The company designs and delivers Mobility-Defined Networks that empower IT departments and mobile generation users. Aruba's solutions unify physical and digital infrastructures into a single cohesive network, offering secure, high-performance wireless and wired connectivity, network management, and security software solutions globally.
